utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each item appears to be fully specified with the necessary details: 
- property: includes type, price, bedrooms, size, features, location (complete).
- financing: includes purchase method, down payment, processing fees, interest rate, term (complete).
- legal_services: includes service type and cost (complete).
- moving_services: includes service level, cost, and packing inclusion (complete).
- setup_services: includes utility package type, cost, and property survey cost (complete).
- total_budget: includes all cost breakdowns and grand total (complete).
Therefore, all 6 out of 6 items are covered and fully detailed.
